subject: [RFC PATCH 22/45] mm: page_alloc: adopt partial pageblocks from tainted superpageblocks

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a new phase to the rmqueue_bulk function in the Linux kernel's page allocation code. The new phase, Phase 2, searches tainted superpageblocks for partially-free pageblocks that match the requested migratetype and claims ownership of them. This reduces fragmentation spread by concentrating non-movable allocations into already-tainted superpageblocks. The patch also includes a check to prevent two CPUs from claiming ownership of the same pageblock simultaneously.
